textEn: Say, “I seek refuge with the Lord of the daybreak,
from the harm of all what He has created;
from the harm of darkening [night] when it spreads around,
textTranslit: Wa min sharri ghasiqin iza waqab

textEn: from the harm of the sorceresses who blow on knots,
and from the harm of the envier when he envies."
textTranslit: Wa min shar ri haasidin iza hasad
